instruction: Add a star to every email in local Bills folder

evaluator.eval: run_sqlite3(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/.thunderbird/t5q2a5hp.default-release/global-messages-db.sqlite', 'dest': 'global-messages-db.sqlite'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'sql': 'select sum(1) > 0 from messageAttributes where attributeID = 58 and value = 1 and messageID in (select id from messages where folderID = 13);'}}))
